mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.company_name AS "companyName", o.legal_name AS "legalName", o.registration_number AS "registrationNumber", o.gst_number AS "gstNumber", o.pan_number AS "panNumber", o.domain, o.active, b.logo_url AS "logoUrl", b.favicon_url AS "faviconUrl", b.primary_color AS "primaryColor", b.copyright_text AS "copyrightText", b.founded_year AS "foundedYear", c.primary_email AS "primaryEmail", c.support_email AS "supportEmail", c.primary_phone AS "primaryPhone", c.support_phone AS "supportPhone", c.website_url AS "websiteUrl", a.address_line1 AS "addressLine1", a.address_line2 AS "addressLine2", a.city, a.state, a.pincode, a.country, l.currency, l.timezone, l.locale, l.date_format AS "dateFormat", l.country_code AS "countryCode", s.facebook_url AS "facebookUrl", s.twitter_url AS "twitterUrl", s.instagram_url AS "instagramUrl", s.linkedin_url AS "linkedinUrl", s.youtube_url AS "youtubeUrl" FROM organisation o LEFT JOIN organisation_branding b ON o.id = b.organisation_id LEFT JOIN organisation_contact c ON o.id = c.organisation_id LEFT JOIN organisation_address a ON o.id = a.organisation_id LEFT JOIN organisation_locale l ON o.id = l.organisation_id LEFT JOIN organisation_social s ON o.id = s.organisation_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM organisation o WHERE o.id = #{id}
